extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny launched a solo sprint at 200m remaining without team leadout, holding off late lunges from DEGENKOLB and DEMARE.
tactical_patterns: COLBRELLI positioned at front without teammates, launching at 200m proves sustainable on stage finish profile when others hesitate.
BORA's BENNETT shows weakness with grimace during leadout phase, signaling form concerns despite team sprint setup.
Traditional leadout trains (WAGNER-GROENEWEGEN, PAOLINI-KRISTOFF) neutralized when solo rider commits early from front position.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: First WorldTour year (Bardiani to Bahrain-Merida) yet strong enough to sustain 200m solo sprint against established sprinters
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Grimacing during leadout phase despite Bora-Hansgrohe support suggests poor condition or illness
rider_signals.DEMARE Arnaud: neutral: Waited in yellow jersey then responded late, showing tactical caution typical of race leader conserving position
rider_signals.DEGENKOLB John: neutral: Late lunge nearly successful but positioning earlier in sprint suggests team leadout dysfunction
